title: Kris Roll No 21

subTitle: When the sorceress Suparna presents Kanishk with a water demon, he puts it in the water fountain at the Mathura Anath Ashram. But when the demon starts to wreak havoc, Kris comes to the rescue.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: On the eve of Holi, Kanishk summons 'Jwalasur' and 'Dhuasur' to ruin Kris and his friends' day. But Kris single handedly manages to vanquish the demons and enjoy Holi.
